title: echium decaisnei subsp. decaisnei
intro: Echium decaisnei subsp. decaisnei, also known as Decaisne's viper's bugloss, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, and is also used to support respiratory and digestive health. Echium decaisnei subsp. decaisnei can be prepared for medicinal use in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
